samples.xml_description:
<module id="calendar">
    <description>Perpetual calendar with continuous looping for seconds and minutes.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="RST">Active-high reset signal.</input>
        <output id="Hours" width_description="[5:0]">Current hour.</output>
        <output id="Mins" width_description="[5:0]">Current minute.</output>
        <output id="Secs" width_description="[5:0]">Current second.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Three always blocks triggered on the positive edge of the clock signal or the positive edge of the reset signal. Each block updates the corresponding time unit (seconds, minutes, hours) based on its own conditions.</implementation>
</module>
